title: Mbriyo Ventures
source_name: follow-builders cloud fallback / keyword search / Anysearch
full_text:
Mbriyo Ventures
Pre-Seed · Acceleration · Vertical AI
Unglamorous.
Unignorable.
Ours.
We back founders who share our conviction for deep and thoughtful AI application,
in complex, regulated industries. We go in early and we build alongside them.
Get in Touch
Our Thesis
Why Vertical AI
One industry. Every layer.
Impossible to remove.
The model is table stakes. What matters now is where you apply it and how deep you go.
We back founders who build for one industry and make themselves impossible to remove. The ones parsing contracts, automating compliance, reading medical records, optimizing vessel routes. Not general-purpose. Not adjacent. Inside the workflow.
That's where the moat is. Not in the model. In the depth.
Complex Operations & Physical Infrastructure
Logistics
Routing, capacity planning, demand forecasting, supply chain resilience
Complex Operations & Physical Infrastructure
Industrial & Maritime
Maintenance, emissions tracking, vessel routing, operational optimization
Complex Operations & Physical Infrastructure
Real Estate
Property search, valuation, negotiation, portfolio management
Complex Operations & Physical Infrastructure
AgriTech
Crop monitoring, yield forecasting, autonomous farm management
Complex Operations & Physical Infrastructure
Procurement
Vendor intelligence, dynamic pricing, sourcing optimization
Regulated Systems & Financial Workflows
LegalTech
Contract analysis, autonomous legal research, compliance monitoring
Regulated Systems & Financial Workflows
FinTech
Fraud detection, underwriting, compliance automation
Accounts Receivable: credit scoring, repayment nudging, risk analysis at scale
Health, Wellness & Human Longevity
Healthcare Operations
Patient intake, medical documentation, billing workflows
Health, Wellness & Human Longevity
HealthTech & Longevity
Personalized health regimens, biomarker-driven interventions
Complex Operations & Physical Infrastructure
Logistics
Routing, capacity planning, demand forecasting, supply chain resilience
Complex Operations & Physical Infrastructure
Industrial & Maritime
Maintenance, emissions tracking, vessel routing, operational optimization
Complex Operations & Physical Infrastructure
Real Estate
Property search, valuation, negotiation, portfolio management
Complex Operations & Physical Infrastructure
AgriTech
Crop monitoring, yield forecasting, autonomous farm management
Complex Operations & Physical Infrastructure
Procurement
Vendor intelligence, dynamic pricing, sourcing optimization
Regulated Systems & Financial Workflows
LegalTech
Contract analysis, autonomous legal research, compliance monitoring
Regulated Systems & Financial Workflows
FinTech
Fraud detection, underwriting, compliance automation
Accounts Receivable: credit scoring, repayment nudging, risk analysis at scale
Health, Wellness & Human Longevity
Healthcare Operations
Patient intake, medical documentation, billing workflows
Health, Wellness & Human Longevity
HealthTech & Longevity
Personalized health regimens, biomarker-driven interventions
The Gap
The best vertical AI founders are unfundable at the moment they need it most.
Too Early
No revenue. No traction. No comparable exit. The spreadsheet says no before the conversation starts.
Too Niche
The domain is unfamiliar. The moat is invisible to outsiders. The risk looks bigger than it is.
Too Technical
The product doesn't exist yet. Conviction required. Data unavailable.
We go in before the traction, into industries that have existed for decades but are now poised to be disrupted by AI.
That's where the best investments will be made and where founders need the most support, early.
How We Work
First check. Full stack.
We invest early, often alongside other investors in syndicated rounds, but capital is only one part of what we do. We identify high-potential teams with promising demos but in need of specialized support to scale. We step in not only with capital but also with an approach (architecture) that leverages venture partners' sweat equity.
Option A: Capital Only
Option B: Services Only (2–3% equity)
Option C: Full Stack (capital + 2–4% services)
Pre-seed cheque
First institutional investor
Founder-friendly terms, decisions in days
1–4 week diagnostic sprint: cap table, GTM, product architecture
12-month strategic guardianship
2–3% equity, no capital from the fund
Shared 50/50 between fund and assigned Venture Partner
Combined investment + hands-on operational support
2–4% services on top of capital
Maximum alignment, maximum support
For highest-conviction plays
Investment Venture Partners
Class C shareholders with long-term, carry-based alignment. Committed to the fund's portfolio for the long haul — skin in the game at the fund level.
Acceleration Venture Partners
Engaged per portfolio company, on a per-engagement basis. No capital required — brought in for their deep operational expertise to build alongside founders.
Investment Criteria
What we look for.
Workflow depth
AI-native products embedded in core workflows, not sitting alongside them
Data defensibility
Access to proprietary, domain-specific data that compounds over time
Revenue signal
Acute pain points, early buyer intent, or initial customer validation
Founder quality
Intelligence, grit, honesty, and the ability to learn from the market
The Team
Partners who've built,
scaled, and operated.
Hello · Hej · Hallo · Γεια σου · こんにちは
Most pre-seed funds have one or two generalist partners. We have six venture partners with deep operating experience across supply chain, AI, healthcare, semiconductors, and global expansion. That's not typical. It's what makes the Architectural Partnership work. Every founder gets matched with a partner who's operated in their industry.
All
AI & Deep Tech
GTM & Positioning
Operations & Scale
FinTech & Governance
HealthTech
AgriTech
Sustainability & Impact
TP
Dr. Thanos Papadimitriou
Partner
Co-founded Charge Ventures — 60+ investments, 3 unicorns including Clay ($5B). Chair at Moveo AI. President at PHAROS, one of 7 EU AI Factories.
Expertise: AI, Venture Building, HealthTech, Blockchain
FP
Fivos Pantazis
Lead Venture Partner
Two-time entrepreneur, former SpeedInvest VP. U.S. CPA. Leads deal origination and fund operations.
Expertise: Fund Operations, Deal Origination, FinTech, PropTech
IT
Imad Tarabay
Venture Partner
Founder, shareholder, and CEO of several successful companies in Lebanon, including Cedarcom MOBI.
Expertise: CRM, Operations, Internet Infrastructure
BK
Bruno Kachrilas
Venture Partner
Senior executive in the agrosupply sector across Southeastern Europe. Strong track record in agricultural operations, commercial strategy, and building profit-driven organizations.
Expertise: AgriTech, Agriculture, Commercial Operations
CM
Christos Makiyama
Venture Partner
President of Silicon Planet. Two decades in venture development. Exits: Think Silicon, Helic, Vidyo.
Expertise: Deep Tech, Semiconductors, IoT, Venture Development
GS
Gustav Stenbeck
Venture Partner
Former CEO of Mestro (IPO 2021). Extensive startup/scaleup experience, multiple exits, multiple boards, including Chair of Proptech AI company Sally R and Tech-VC PÄAB.
Expertise: Sustainable & Impact Tech, PropTech, Digital Platforms, Public Markets
VB
Vas Bakopoulos
Venture Partner
Leads AI research with the top 100 CMOs at MMA Global. Created Possible, one of the largest marketing conferences globally. Former Digitas/Publicis strategist.
Expertise: AI, Positioning, GTM Strategy, Marketing Effectiveness, Consumer Insight
ET
Eleftheria Topaloglou
Analyst
Behavioral Neuroscience + Business (Brandeis). Founded ProjectFee fashion-tech initiative.
Expertise: Behavioral Science, Consumer, CleanTech, HealthTech, AgriTech
Our Portfolio
Ventures we back.
AI that compounds. Transform customer-facing operations from a cost center into shared intelligence — preventing issues earlier, resolving them faster, and capturing revenue that others miss.
Visit site →
Precision metabolic testing technology delivering clinical-grade health insights for longevity and performance.
Visit site →
BHI — Beauty Health Index
Data-driven beauty and health intelligence platform redefining how consumers understand and track their wellbeing.
Coming soon
Get in Touch
Got something worth going deep on?
We're looking for founders who go deep into complex industries and build AI-native products that become the workflow. If that's you, we want to hear from you.

Acceleration Venture Partners
Engaged per portfolio company, on a per-engagement basis. No capital required — brought in for their deep operational expertise to build alongside founders.
Investment Criteria
What we look for.
Workflow depth
AI-native products embedded in core workflows, not sitting alongside them
Data defensibility
Access to proprietary, domain-specific data that compounds over time
Revenue signal
Acute pain points, early buyer intent, or initial customer validation
Founder quality
Intelligence, grit, honesty, and the ability to learn from the market
The Team
Partners who've built,
scaled, and operated.
